//: cogyard plugin hooks — ONLY the cogyard-specific guards. Generic bash/edit/read-CLAUDE guards are not part of this plugin. The two ENGINE hooks (SessionStart worktree-wiring + frontmatter validator) run via `cogyard hook …` (the npm bin on PATH) so the plugin references nothing outside itself → it's safe to install via copy-to-cache (no `../../` escape). Requires the engine on PATH: `npm i -g @cogyard/cli` (or `npm link` in a clone). The task-skill guard is plugin-local (self-contained).
